verses:
parama dayāla he rādheśyāma!
jaśodājīvana, gopīprāṇadhana,
vṛndāvanadhana gopāla śyāma

devakī nandana, muralī vadana,
kālīya damana he ghanaśyāma

kaṁsake damana, jadukula pālana,
bhaktake jīvana dayāla śyāma
en_translation:
O supremely merciful Rādhā and Śyāma! You are the life of Mother Yaśodā and the wealth of the gopīs' lives. You are the treasure of Vṛndāvana, O Gopāla Śyāma!

O Son of Devakī! O You whose face holds the flute! O Subduer of the serpent Kāliya! O dark Lord Kṛṣṇa!

O Subduer of Kaṁsa and Protector of the Yadu dynasty! You are the life of Your devotees, O merciful Lord Śyāma!
